title: Citrus Zaatar Pâte
description: A citrusy, crumbly Syrian dish featuring smoky olive oil and za'atar seasoning, suitable for vegans.

ingredients.name: 3 tablespoons olive oil (smoked or regular, optional for flavor)

instructions: Blend tahini, lemon juice, garlic, cumin seeds, za'atar seasoning in a food processor or blender.
With the machine running, slowly add olive oil until you reach your desired consistency (start with less if using smoky oil).
Fold in chopped dates and blend to combine. Taste and adjust seasoning as needed.
Transfer mixture to a bowl and chill for at least 30 minutes before serving.
